The use of the English terms in parentheses (fine-tuning, ICL) helps maintain clarity, matching the original's intent.

information_completeness.reasoning: Almost all information is present. C'est l'apprentissage en contexte en action.'). The omission of 'Exactement ! C'est' makes the sentence grammatically incomplete, though the meaning remains clear.

evaluation.overall_comment: The translation is of high quality, capturing the conversational tone and the technical nuances of the AI concepts effectively. It is accurate and reads naturally.
